untranslatable_reason: CHADTP oscillator is not available in the allowed indicators list. CHADTP requires custom calculation of (Sum(AdvancingNYSE,5) - Sum(DecliningNYSE,5))/5, where AdvancingNYSE and DecliningNYSE are breadth data not provided in the allowed indicators. The signal requires specific threshold comparisons (+400 and -400) that cannot be replicated with available price/technical indicators. The 10 basis points offset condition has been approximated as prev_high/prev_low comparisons, but the core oscillator logic is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Signal requires CHADTP breadth oscillator which is not available. Price conditions (10 bps above/below previous day levels) have been approximated as crosses above prev_high and below prev_low. This is a significant simplification and does not capture the original intent. Recommend implementing CHADTP as a custom indicator in the backtest engine.
